testcase.name: backend API health endpoint returns ok status
page loads without fatal JS console errors
Leaflet map container is visible after load
aircraft icons appear on canvas within 10s of page load
clicking aircraft on map opens sidebar with flight details
search bar is present, accepts input, and shows results
WebSocket-based data delivery is active (AERO-SYNC mode)
no 4xx or 5xx errors on critical API calls during normal operation
UI layout has no broken or zero-dimension critical elements
aircraft count is displayed in UI and shows live data
planes bbox API returns aircraft data with correct parameters
full user flow: page loads, aircraft appear, map is interactive
Flight Trail Investigation › capture trail rendering at multiple zoom levels
Flight Trail Deep Investigation › click aircraft and observe trail rendering
